top3.sql:
SELECT 
    r.year,
    AVG(CAST(REPLACE(REPLACE(r.time, ':', ''), '.', '') AS REAL) / 1000) AS avg_time_seconds
FROM 
    races r
    JOIN results res ON r.raceId = res.raceId
WHERE 
    r.year < 1975
    AND r.time IS NOT NULL
    AND r.time != ''
GROUP BY 
    r.year
ORDER BY 
    r.year;

SELECT 
    r.year,
    AVG(CAST(REPLACE(REPLACE(r.time, ':', ''), '.', '') AS REAL) / 1000) AS avg_time_seconds
FROM 
    races r
    JOIN results res ON r.raceId = res.raceId
WHERE 
    r.year < 1975
    AND r.time IS NOT NULL
    AND r.time != ''
GROUP BY 
    r.year
ORDER BY 
    r.year;

SELECT 
    r.year,
    AVG(
        CAST(
            (CAST(SUBSTR(r.time, 1, INSTR(r.time, ':') - 1) AS REAL) * 60) + 
            CAST(SUBSTR(r.time, INSTR(r.time, ':') + 1) AS REAL)
        AS REAL)
    ) AS avg_time_seconds
FROM 
    races r
    JOIN driverStandings ds ON r.raceId = ds.raceId
    JOIN drivers d ON ds.driverId = d.driverId
WHERE 
    r.year < 1975
    AND ds.position = 1
    AND r.time IS NOT NULL
    AND r.time != ''
    AND r.time != '\N'
GROUP BY 
    r.year
ORDER BY 
   ...

SELECT 
    r.year,
    AVG(
        CAST(
            SUBSTR(r.time, 1, INSTR(r.time, ':') - 1) AS REAL
        ) * 60 +
        CAST(
            SUBSTR(r.time, INSTR(r.time, ':') + 1) AS REAL
        )
    ) AS avg_time_seconds
FROM 
    races r
    JOIN results res ON r.raceId = res.raceId
    JOIN driverStandings ds ON res.raceId = ds.raceId AND res.driverId = ds.driverId
WHERE 
    r.year < 1975
    AND r.time IS NOT NULL
    AND r.time != ''
    AND ds.position = 1
GROUP BY 
    r.year
OR...

final.sql:
SELECT 
    r.year,
    AVG(CAST(REPLACE(REPLACE(r.time, ':', ''), '.', '') AS REAL) / 1000) AS avg_time_seconds
FROM 
    races r
    JOIN results res ON r.raceId = res.raceId
WHERE 
    r.year < 1975
    AND r.time IS NOT NULL
    AND r.time != ''
GROUP BY 
    r.year
ORDER BY 
    r.year;
